    "Route conductors neatly along the sides of the wiring gutter using approved cable ties or support mechanisms.",

  "rationale": "Conductors crossing the bus gutter space violate NEC requirements for wire-bending space, gutter fill, and physical protection of conductors. While the work is in-progress, this routing method is non-compliant and must be corrected before completion.",
